query:
INSERT INTO places (name, slug, type, atollId, code)
SELECT DISTINCT ig.name, LOWER(REPLACE(ig.name, ' ', '-')), 'island', a.id, UPPER(SUBSTRING(ig.name, 1, 3))
FROM island_guides ig
LEFT JOIN places p ON ig.name = p.name AND p.type = 'island'
LEFT JOIN atolls a ON a.name = ig.atoll
WHERE ig.contentType = 'island' AND p.id IS NULL AND a.id IS NOT NULL;
